commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Skill detail tab state, local-auth publish lifecycle Playwright helpers/tests, and `.gitignore` to reduce the generated Skill Card publish e2e flake.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body gives a concrete `bun run test:pw:publish-lifecycle` failure path with repeated pre-fix Crabbox failures, and current main source shows how `#skill-card` can be reset before the generated tab exists.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; this PR has no actionable finding and only needs normal CI and maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(voice-call): avoid OpenAI realtime double greeting
target.body:
Fixes #85846

## Summary

- Avoid the voice-call plugin's duplicate OpenAI realtime greeting by making proactive/manual OpenAI speech an instructed `response.create` instead of injecting a synthetic user message.
- Keep outbound OpenAI calls proactive: the bridge still calls `triggerGreeting()` on ready when an initial message exists.
- Preserve configured session instructions for explicit/manual speech and carry the latest response intent through deferred, cancel, and active-response retry paths.
- Keep session instructions as the base voice instructions; initial greeting instructions are scoped to the first proactive response.
- Narrow the realtime test callback before invoking optional `sendUserMessage`, fixing the CI `check-test-types` failure that appeared on head `31c07ccee8f1ee9dc3a45c78cc35177cd09d1ed1`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts extensions/openai/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 2 files, 74 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts extensions/openai/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/openai/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts extensions/openai/realtime-voice-provider.ts extensions/openai/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

Signed head: `33e8bb81b48f537f1191cd12bb2128ea0a400fb8`.

Note: no live Twilio/OpenAI outbound call was run in this environment.
